articles.title: Bid to clean up a rotten trail in Hyderabad’s thriving food scene
articles.description: Beneath Hyderabad’s booming food economy lies a dark web of adulteration, mislabelling and unsafe practices. Of late, an unprecedented police-led crackdown is pulling back the curtain on a sprawling food fraud network that thrives on gaps in regulation and consumer trust. But as enforcement tightens and complaints surge, the city finds itself trying not just to fix a broken food chain, but also to restore faith in what lands on every plate, write Serish Nanisetti and Lavpreet Kaur

articles.title: Live: Amit Shah to launch BJP's Sankalp Patra in Kolkata today
articles.description: Live Amit Shah to launch BJPs Sankalp Patra in Kolkata today

articles.title: Thirty years on, Akshaya Kshetram is home to 100 persons with intellectual disabilities
articles.description: Akshaya Kshetram, a home for persons with intellectual disabilities near Tirumala, turns 30 and plans outreach activities and an awareness walk

articles.title: AIMIM severs ties with Humayun Kabir’s party in West Bengal after viral video clip
articles.description: AIMIM underlined that it would now fight the polls independently in that State

articles.title: Gaganyaan mission: ISRO completes second Integrated Air Drop Test
articles.description: Union Minister of State for Science and Technology Dr. Jitendra Singh announced the accomplishment of the IADT-02 in a post on X

articles.title: Gold Price Today: MCX Rate Down As Geopolitical Uncertainties Continue
articles.description: MCX gold May futures contract fell 0.42%, while  MCX silver May futures dropped 0.5%.

articles.title: Namibia vs Oman: Preview, Likely XIs, Live Streaming And More
articles.description: Namibia face mounting pressure at home while Oman arrive in form, with crucial ICC Men's Cricket World Cup League 2 points on the line in Windhoek.

topStories.title: Quote of the day: John F Kennedy's timeless words of wisdom — 'If free society cannot help poor, it cannot….'
topStories.description: Former US President John F Kennedy believed that a society's freedom is contingent on its support for the impoverished, linking the fates of the rich and poor.

topStories.title: Insider trading over US-Iran war? White House sends warning to staff, asks officials not to bet on prediction markets
topStories.description: The email issued on 24 March came a day after US President Donald Trump issued a brief pause on some Iran strikes. It advised employees against placing trades on financial markets and fast-growing event betting platforms.

topStories.title: White House Warns Staff On Insider Trading Amid Iran War Bets
topStories.description: The warning comes after a series of recent well-timed and profitable bets raised questions about potential insider trading around President Donald Trump's decision-making on military maneuvers in Iran...

topStories.title: UK PM Keir Starmer visits Gulf to shore up ‘fragile’ US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: As UK PM Keir Starmer arrived in Doha as part of a Gulf tour he discussed efforts to secure the US-Iran ceasefire.

topStories.title: Iran's IRGC denies attacking Gulf States as Kuwait condemns aggression, Saudi Arabia reports damage to oil facilities
topStories.description: The developments come amid a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, after negotiators clinched a temporary two-week truce just 90 minutes before Trump's Tuesday deadline to Tehran over the Strait of Hormuz was to expire. US and Iranian negotiators are set to meet on Saturday for talks.

topStories.title: Shipping in Strait of Hormuz still at a trickle despite US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Washington and Tehran accuse each other of not honouring truce agreement.

topStories.title: Supreme Court flags risk of ‘dividing society’ if temple access restricted by caste or sect
topStories.description: "If you say it is a practice…that only my section must attend my temple and no one else, that is not good for Hinduism,” the nine-judge bench remarked.

topStories.title: White House warned staff against betting on futures markets amid Iran war, official says
topStories.description: The White House cautioned staff against using their positions for futures market bets following a pause in Iran strikes. This comes amid scrutiny over well-timed bets preceding major policy decisions, raising questions about potential information leaks. A significant bet on oil futures preceded a delay in attacks on Iran's energy infrastructure, after which oil prices dropped.

topStories.title: ‘Dishonourable!’: Trump says ‘Iran doing a very poor job’ as ship traffic slumps in Hormuz despite ceasefire
topStories.description: Donald Trump criticized Iran for poorly managing the Strait of Hormuz and warned against reports of Tehran charging fees to oil tankers. This comment precedes US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad as the White House supports reopening the strait amidst ongoing tensions.

topStories.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
topStories.description: The platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making bets on global events.

topStories.title: US Postal Service to suspend pension contributions, proposes price hikes to ease cash crisis — Here's what it said
topStories.description: The suspension of employer contributions to Federal Employees Retirement System annuities will help it keep making payroll, paying suppliers and delivering the mail, the USPS said.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
topStories.description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

dailyNews.title: From Tucker Carlson to Candace Owens and Alex Jones, Trump takes aim at right-wing commentators—‘losers’ with ‘low IQs’
dailyNews.description: In a lengthy post on Truth Social, Trump trained his guns on former allies turned vocal critics, including Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones, dismissing them as 'losers' with low IQs attempting to hijack his movement for cheap publicity.

dailyNews.title: Implement Supreme Court verdict in the TAIT-2022: Congress leader writes to CM
dailyNews.description: Due to the wrong decision of the State government’s education department, about 8000 OBC and other candidates have been excluded from the recruitment process despite having merit, he said

dailyNews.title: US Iran War LIVE: Trump says Iran doing ‘very poor job’ of allowing oil through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: US Iran War LIVE: The White House supports reopening the strait as part of the ceasefire deal, but says that Trump opposes Iran's military, which continues to control the waterway, from seeking to raise revenue by charging tolls on passing ships, AP reported.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Israeli attacks on Lebanon threaten US-Iran ceasefire talks
dailyNews.description: Iran’s parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf warns ‘time is running out’ amid Israel’s attacks on Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Police in Venezuela block protesters calling for higher wages, pensions
dailyNews.description: Cost of living issues have persisted in Venezuela since the US abducted former President Nicolas Maduro in January.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran ceasefire: Uncertainty over what’s next
dailyNews.description: Two‑week US‑Iran ceasefire pauses war; “who won?” unresolved as Hormuz, Lebanon strikes, Iran capabilities persist.

dailyNews.title: Judge bars Trump administration from nixing protected status for Ethiopians
dailyNews.description: Ruling marks legal setback for administration's efforts to roll back protections for various groups of immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
dailyNews.description: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

dailyNews.title: Florida AG to probe OpenAI, alleging possible connection to FSU shooting
dailyNews.description: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier plans to investigate OpenAI for its alleged harm to minors, potential to threaten national security, and its possible link to a shooting at Florida State University last year.

dailyNews.title: Democrats in US slam Pam Bondi for refusing to appear for Epstein hearing
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers warn the former Justice Department chief that a congressional subpoena for her testimony remains in effect.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump denies ‘relationship’ with Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: First Lady Melania Trump denied any relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Why did the Congress withdraw its candidate from Baramati at the last minute?
dailyNews.description: Despite Congress’ withdrawal, the election in the Pawar bastion will not be unopposed

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts Biden admin for releasing illegal immigrant now charged in fatal hammer attack on Florida mother
dailyNews.description: President blasts Biden for releasing a Haitian immigrant now accused of fatally bludgeoning a woman with a hammer at a Florida gas station last week.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump's forceful Epstein denial draws bipartisan support from lawmakers
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump denounced allegations tying her to Jeffrey Epstein, prompting bipartisan calls for congressional hearings and accountability.

dailyNews.title: Inside Tehran after strikes: Iranian woman describes fear, checkpoints and people used as ‘human shields’
dailyNews.description: An anonymous Iranian woman detailed to The Australian the nightly explosions, celebrations and fear in Tehran as Trump's two-week ceasefire with Iran tentatively took hold.

dailyNews.title: Bruce Springsteen blasts rich men in America as critics call out his billions
dailyNews.description: Bruce Springsteen sparked controversy with a fiery anti-Trump speech, but critics point out his reported $1.2 billion net worth undercuts his message.

dailyNews.title: Ivanka Trump breaks down in emotional interview talking about her mother Ivana’s death, other challenges
dailyNews.description: Ivanka Trump became emotional discussing her late mother Ivana Trump's sudden death and other personal challenges during a rare podcast interview.

dailyNews.title: Senate Dem accuses Trump of being 'unfit for office,' joins growing call to impeach, oust president
dailyNews.description: Sen. Andy Kim, D-N.J., said President Donald Trump should be removed over the Iran war, citing the 25th Amendment and impeachment as Democrats escalate calls to oust the president.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Cuban president reacts to Trump admin’s call for him to step down
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel says "stepping down [is] not part of our vocabulary" amid reports that the U.S. government has asked the Cuban leader to resign.

dailyNews.description: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran against charging tolls through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Only about a dozen ships passed through the Strait of Hormuz in the first two days of the ceasefire, far below normal traffic levels before the war, data shows.
